features.name: case statement empty default with register default
features.description: Code should include a case statement inside a combinational always block where a register variable is assigned as the default value before the case, and the case has an empty default branch

features.name: partial case pattern coverage with state feedback
features.description: Code should include a case statement where the patterns do not cover all possible values of the selector, and the default value depends on a register variable that is fed back from clocked logic
